subcodes.title: Words to Will and Wendell Dodge, spoken on 1901-11-19
subcodes.first_line: Today the body of the world is sick. All nations are raising the banners of war and the illness, being very severe, needs the divine Physician.
subcodes.subjects: @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @love and unity, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God as divine physician
